<td id="Card19550541" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href19550541" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAAD52KY3NEMHT7AMWK2RFHW7YAC6VTE22YAPTQP56GTRU74EGBF323HUVSY4INAIHQREWMYZNT52YDUEYK6KMDGMGJUSUTSYOOYFWSHWOWCVKI7ROYZIJBXYHYYTFIZTZEG7HNW2GKROHMWMGCAD6SJZXGQ4LUSBDDILYY5N732UQGAXYLJ2AOIEQ66PJUTO6HXX7M2CIH6VVGPADZ2ARUULK2KETEREVLRNYAD7RSM6M2HR2PRCGM4WS4QMXQCMQSRKYCEVXNBJGTWW4FZHX6CDDH6BY&d=AIAADWPQDRM7PC36F32E24S5HDTLPRYM23M3BB3EANKZOTI7GAYKMPJY5KIICL4KJ7ZPLXCV2JRD6KCACQKX5WIGJENJFLHGCWFVO652QEWMFR76BYIQG4QTJWCL6OGATYCU2PX3N4BY5NFZOUNEY6LA5D7BMI6S577CXUH5MAOZUVPX5F6XEYR3&" target="_blank">
                        <img id="Img19550541" width="295" height="160" style="border: none; display: block; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0px;" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.1c6fc990c110644409c9203e96d9b250&pid=Wdp&w=295&h=160&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2">
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title19550541" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href19550541" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADJAI7UOVBG2KJWUT6OQSLW2HIIIA32NGMQ2E7R6NU6WP7B4CNASDHWZFDJQD5RPXKQXQJLXTMHGGC3UWF6UUIGYKUZ5U4IUOEH2OSCUL6EPJZZTOSRSDWO6QCMX3EVLITKV3FIAK2VIX6IOGVBY4MPIMSGSAYYBRUXKGBVD2JQSXYIELWXEPN57OCD6QLLLMGCP6BJMPKAUSKCNCCI3WUOGNRZLAX3H6L2MKS6TZDDYFXAUCGWT6CCFONVAIW3ZJMXYXS2Z5SS6IFWKLCDPD43SHM6Q&d=AIAAC63HLYKVWMYLQWK6EGNWCW23Q3HGNDIJQQSFD6TG6O54EWSCPGS4CXSYJ7LWFNOGEAABT6RBCQZNPTJHKJIW5PWRMAQO7NI6ABZHD2JTPES6DBKDY64YB5QSBKCV6YLVWYHRMFXMI7TAHNVHLDKYRTCIMIF6BYFDZKIXIWUYTZNQUVXJPD6O&" target="_blank">
                        Texas Judge Hands Joe Biden Big Win
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
